title: Always Bright
description: A  mod that forces full brightness even when shaders are enabled, so your world is always fully lit with no dark areas.
body:
**AlwaysBright** is a Minecraft mod that forces full brightness at all times, even when shaders are enabled. No more dark caves, dim dungeons, or shadowy corners  every area of your world stays fully lit without needing to adjust gamma settings or use night vision.

Compatible with popular shader packs, AlwaysBright ensures your brightness settings are never overridden. Perfect for players who want a cleaner, fully visible Minecraft experience while keeping their shaders active.

Features:

Forces full brightness in all lighting conditions
Works with shaders enabled
No configuration needed
Lightweight and performance friendly
Compatible with Fabric and Forge


Tags: fullbright minecraft, minecraft fullbright mod, fullbright with shaders, minecraft always bright, no dark minecraft, minecraft brightness mod, shader fullbright fix
